payload.text: I am out of the office from 12 May 2026 through 19 May 2026 with limited email access. For urgent production matters, please contact ops-oncall@myco.example. I will respond to all other requests as soon as I return. Thank you for your understanding and patience.

rubric.task_summary: Generate a 30-50 word out-of-office email with specific dates, contact info, and tone constraints.
recommended_strategy_axes: Exact string matching for email and dates
Tone check for warmth and brevity

candidates.solution: Thank you for your email. I am out of the office from 12 May 2026 through 19 May 2026 with limited access. For urgent production matters, please contact ops-oncall@myco.example. I will respond to all other requests when I return. Thank you for your understanding and patience during this time.
assumptions: The date format '12 May 2026' satisfies the requirement to reference both dates.
known_risks: Word count must be strictly between 30 and 50.

candidates.solution: Thank you for your message. I am out of the office from 12 May 2026 through 19 May 2026 with limited email access. I will reply to non-urgent requests upon my return. For urgent production matters, please contact ops-oncall@myco.example directly. Thank you for your understanding and patience during this time.
assumptions: The phrase '12 May 2026 through 19 May 2026' satisfies the date reference constraint.
The word count includes all words in the body text.
known_risks: Word count might be slightly off depending on tokenization rules for hyphenated words or numbers, though 'ops-oncall@myco.example' is one word.

candidates.solution: I am out of office from 12 May through 19 May 2026. I will have limited access to email during this time. For urgent production issues, please contact ops-oncall@myco.example. For all other matters, I will respond to your message as soon as I return to work on 20 May. Thank you for your understanding.
assumptions: The date format '12 May' and '19 May' is acceptable.
The phrase 'out of office' is standard and clear.
Counting words by whitespace separation is the standard method.
known_risks: Word count might be exactly 40, which is within range, but needs careful verification.
Mentioning '20 May' adds a word; ensuring total count stays under 50 is critical.
